common.loadingSessionMessage: Checking whether a local session already exists.

signIn.title: Ship from a clean mobile foundation.
signIn.description: This starter comes with local auth, route guards, TanStack Query and a protected app shell already wired.
signIn.successDescription: Local session restored in the protected app shell.

signUp.title: Create a starter account
signUp.description: The boilerplate stores a local session and profile so you can build app flows before a real backend exists.
signUp.successDescription: Local auth is ready. Replace the repository with your real API when needed.

forgotPassword.title: Simulate the reset flow
forgotPassword.description: In this local boilerplate, the flow verifies that an account exists and confirms the request so you can wire the UI now.
forgotPassword.successMessage: Local flow complete. Replace this with your real reset-password backend later.
forgotPassword.successDescription: A real backend can now replace this placeholder flow.

home.description: This app now starts from a real boilerplate: auth, protected routing, TanStack Query and a sample feature live in the same structure.
home.aiSampleDescription: Kept outside the core tabs so the boilerplate stays generic.

homeFilters.title: Filters
homeFilters.description: Tune what appears on the home dashboard without leaving the tab.
homeFilters.checklistHint: Choose which starter blocks remain visible in the main section.
homeFilters.surfaceHint: Keep the home tab focused by hiding optional cards.
homeFilters.aiSampleDescription: Controls the shortcut to the sample chat screen.

activity.title: Sample server-state screen
activity.description: This screen is intentionally boring: it exists to demonstrate refetching, cache reuse and loading states without product-specific assumptions.

glass.title: Glass tab is back.
glass.description: This screen keeps the visual language and interaction samples available without turning the whole starter into a pure demo app.
glass.primaryGlassDescription: Hero surfaces, blur and highlights stay reusable for launch screens and premium moments.
glass.toastsDescription: Global feedback is now part of the base app shell instead of living only inside forms.
glass.toastSuccessDescription: Shadcn-style toast feedback is now wired in the boilerplate.

onboarding.slide1Body: Auth, forms, API client, i18n, and native modules are pre-wired so you ship features faster.
onboarding.slide2Body: Error boundaries, analytics hooks, feature flags, and OTA-ready updates come as defaults.
onboarding.slide3Body: Swap local auth for your API, tune themes, and keep the patterns that match your product.

settings.title: Settings and profile
settings.profileUpdatedDescription: The local session and query cache now share the same name.
settings.profileUpdatedInline: Profile updated in local storage and query cache.
settings.pushHint: Uses expo-notifications; needs a dev build + EAS project id for tokens.
settings.appearanceHint: Choose between system, light, or dark mode.
settings.languageHint: Choose the app language used by the mobile interface.
settings.biometricHint: Prompt Face ID / Touch ID before sensitive actions (demo).
settings.biometricUnavailableDescription: No enrolled biometrics on this device.
